programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programs.desc: Rachel believes her annoying, self-indulgent younger sister, Amy, is on the verge of changing her attitude. To help her become more responsible, Rachel allows Amy to babysit.

programs.title: Friends
programs.desc: Ross has the chance to receive a grant, but must break up with Charlie to get it. Phoebe tries to give a hideous painting to Monica and Rachel.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With The Home Study
programs.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a children's charity.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Wil Wheaton go head to head for the role of the new Professor Proton. Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are on bed rest.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: When Bert asks Sheldon to collaborate on a project with him, Sheldon becomes worried about others finding out because he thinks geology is beneath him. Raj seeks advice after reconnecting with Ruchi.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.
